jd_text: Role: Project Director Location: Al Khobar, Kingdom of Saudi Arabia About Compass Project Consulting Compass Project Consulting is an award-winning, dynamic, and respected project development consultancy, providing high-quality, value-for-money, and fully tailored services to clients across all sectors. As highly regarded project leaders and effective communicators, our Team at Compass has delivered numerous projects for some of the region’s most ambitious and innovative change-makers. Our diverse and disciplined Team facilitates world-class project development solutions. Our core values guide our decisions and constitute our culture, empowering us to perform at our highest level on behalf of our clients. Drawing on our extensive delivery experience, industry-wide knowledge, and sophisticated project development tools, we facilitate the most proficient path toward project success, overcoming constraints and obstacles to deliver projects effectively and efficiently for our clients. We lead project success stories. Role Overview This is a senior leadership opportunity to join a renowned organization known for its high-calibre experience across the region’s built environment. We are seeking a Project Director to lead the delivery of a major mixed-use / retail development in Al Khobar. The role will act as the client’s representative, overseeing project delivery from design through to completion, ensuring alignment with programme objectives, commercial performance, and stakeholder expectations. You will provide strategic leadership across project delivery, commercial governance, and stakeholder engagement, ensuring the successful execution of a high-profile development. Key Responsibilities Project Leadership Lead overall project delivery as the client representative Establish and drive project strategy, governance, and execution plans Manage and oversee multidisciplinary teams across design, commercial, and construction Delivery & Performance Oversee project delivery across time, cost, quality, and risk Monitor contractor and consultant performance Resolve complex delivery challenges and drive project outcomes Commercial & Contractual Oversight Provide leadership on commercial strategy and contractual matters Oversee cost control, variations, claims, and dispute resolution Support key commercial decisions to protect project value Stakeholder Management Act as the primary interface with the client and key stakeholders Lead engagement with authorities, consultants, and contractors Provide clear reporting and strategic updates to senior stakeholders Risk & Governance Establish project governance and reporting structures Identify and mitigate key project risks Ensure compliance with client and project standards Candidate Requirements Minimum 20 years of experience in project management and delivery Proven delivery of at least two major mixed-use or retail developments (100,000 m² BUA) within the GCC Strong experience in Design & Build environments and working with separate CSC contracts Demonstrated experience in a client-facing or client representative role Strong commercial awareness with experience in contractual and financial decision-making Professional certifications such as PMP, MRICS, PgMP, or equivalent Experience working on large-scale developments in Saudi Arabia Strong leadership and stakeholder management capability Ability to operate in a complex, multi-stakeholder environment Application To express your interest in a career with us, please apply via the link attached. Shortlisted candidates will be contacted by a Talent Acquisition representative. Website: https://compass-pc.com/about-compass Instagram: @compass_pc Evolving Tomorrow, Today
